response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no familiarity with embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and tooling expertise
Proven ability to work across hardware-software boundaries (e.g., embedded systems at NI)
concerns: No C or embedded Linux kernel development experience required for the role
No exposure to LAN-switch security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
